titleStmt.title: SII 15.28: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 28. (B.K. No. 194 of 1926-27.) KŌḌĪKOP, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up inside the temple of Mūlabrahmēśvara.

This is dated the 7th regnal year of the king, Raktākshi, Pushya-amāvāsyā, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, solar eclipse. The date corresponds to 1144 A.D., December 25, Monday, f.d.t. °25. The eclipse, however, occurred on Tuesday.

It describes the king's subordinate Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jagadēkamalla Permāḍi, son of Āchugi-maṇḍalēśa of the Sinda family and states that when he was governing the tracts of Kisukāḍu, Bāgaḍage, Keḷavāḍi and Narayaṁgallu, gifts of income derived from the cess on betel leaves, oil-mill, etc., were made for the worship and offering of the god Mūlasthāna Brahmēśvara of Kiṟunarayaṁgal in Kisukāḍu-70 by the Taṁbuliga One Thousand, Ugura Three Hundred, and others. It mentions the teacher Vāmaśakti as the family priest of Permmāḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē ©
© namaśśāśvatikānaṁdajñānaiśva¨ryyamayātmanē saṁkaḷpasaphalabrahmastaṁbhāraṁbhāya śaṁbhavē ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaparamēśvare para
mabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu pratāpacakrava
¨rtti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā
¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire © Ā mahānubhāvana pādapadmōpajīvi . Ācugimaṁḍa ḷēśana ta
nūbhavanugravirōdhi maṁḍaḷēśācaḷavajranapratimapauruṣanunnatakī¨rttiyiṁ
da nāggōcaranā¨rggaveṁbinagavī jagamellamaneyde suttugoṁḍāvarisi¨rdda jasaduṁnnatiyiṁ
kali pe¨rmmabhūbhuja . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara . virōdhi maṁ
ḍaḷika madanamahēśvara . nijanāmāvaḷīvirājitarappa śrīmanumahāmaṁ
ḍaḷēśvaraṁ jagadēkamallape¨rmāḍidēvarasa¨rkkisukāḍunāḍumaṁ bāgaḍagenāḍumaṁ ke
ḷavāḍināḍumaṁ nareyaṁgallu maṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipā
ḷanammāḍi rājadhāni noḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge yyu
ttamire . v® . poredā nabhavaṁ brahmēśvaraṁ niccavāda radiṁ
da¨rccisutti¨rppa tanna kuladeyvaṁ vāmaśaktibratīśvararārādhyanenalke peṁpana
ninnēvaṇnipaṁ baṇnipaṁ naranī molleya yācaṁṇanaṁ dha¨rmmātmanaṁ ba¨rmmanaṁ . śrī
vāmaśaktipaṁḍitadēva[¨rmmadhyāhnakāma]dhēnuvenippī bhūvaḷeyaviditakī
¨rttiyanāvarisidareṁdoḍavaranē vaṇṇipudu . gurugaḻu tapōdhana¨rppurahara
niṣṭadeyva¨rvuguramūnū¨rvva¨rggaccariyenipa dānaguṇavābhareṇaṁ kē
vaḷame sujanacūḍāmaṇigaṇa . paravanitālōluparaṁ paradhanakāṁkṣi
taranucitavaṟiyada vidhyādhararenisi¨rddeleya bo
jagarevembadu . svasti śrīmatu pratāpacakrava¨rtti jagadēka
mallava¨rṣada neya raktākṣi saṁvatsarada puṣyadamavāsya sōmavāra Uttarā
yaṇa saṁkramaṇa vyatīpāta sū¨ryyagyahaṇadandu kisukāḍeppatta
ṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ kiṟunareyaṁgalla śrī mūlasthāna brahmēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōga
kke taṁbuligasāsi¨rvvaraśēśami¨rddu kiṟunareyaṁgalla koydeleya hēṟiṁge vīsavoṁdu ttaradēva¨rgge
levoṟege kāgiṇiyeraḍu . mattavā dēvara nandādīvigege sa¨rvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭa
gāṇavondu . brahmēśvaradēva¨rgguguramūnū¨rvvaruṁmeleyabojaṁgara
ynūṟanālvaru yaśēśami¨rddu pratyēka vokkalalondu paṇamaṁ dēvaraṁgabhō
gakke biṭṭaru . Ummacigeya voroḍeyapramukha mahājana nūṟanālva
ra kayyoḷu molleya bammaṇnaṁ sa¨rvvanamaśyamāge māṟugoṁḍu Ūriṁ mūḍa
kukkanūra baṭṭeya gottina kalliṁ baḍaga tanna brahmēśvaradēva¨rgge biṭṭa mattaru ha
nneraḍu . Intī sthānemaṁ pratipāḷisida¨rgge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrava
¨rghyatī¨rtthameṁba divyatī¨rtthaṁgaḷoḷu sū¨ryyagrahaṇadandu divyatapōdha
na¨rggaṁ vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇa¨rggaṁ sahasrakavilegaḷanaḷaṁkārasahitaṁ koṭṭa
puṇyaphaḷamakku Idanaḷidātanā tī¨rtthaṁgaḷoḷā tapōdhanarumanā brāhmaṇaru
manā kavilegaḷmanaḷida mahāpātakanakku . © .
Digital edition of SII 15.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
